mapper.select:
select vdi.id do_main_index_id,
vdi.index_name_en do_main_index_name, vdi.definition_en indexDetail,
vdi.index_name do_main_index_name, vdi.definition indexDetail,
AVG(vdt.presentation_value) do_main_index_avg_score from vehicle_domain_index vdi left join vehicle_domain_tree vdt on vdi.id = vdt.domain_index_id WHERE vdi.functional_domain = #{functionalDomain} GROUP BY vdi.id

SELECT vdi.id as do_main_index_id,
vdi.index_name_en as do_main_index_name,
vdi.index_name as do_main_index_name,
AVG(vdtr.presentation_value) as do_main_index_avg_score FROM vehicle_domain_tag vdt left join vehicle_domain_index vdi on vdi.functional_domain = vdt.functional_domain_id left join vehicle_domain_tree vdtr on vdtr.domain_index_id = vdi.id where vdt.tag_name = #{domainTagName} and vdtr.calculate_score > 0 GROUP BY vdi.id
SELECT CONCAT(a.functional_domain_name, '-', v.index_name) AS domain_name, v.id AS index_id FROM vehicle_domain_index v LEFT JOIN vehicle_functional_domain a ON v.functional_domain = a.id

SELECT
a.index_name_en index_name,a.definition_en detail
a.index_name index_name,a.definition detail
FROM `vehicle_domain_index` a , vehicle_functional_domain b where a.functional_domain = b.id and b.id = #{domainId}
